name: Profile_R5_ImagingStudy_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.ImagingStudy resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 ImagingStudy resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 ImagingStudy resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.ImagingStudy resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 ImagingStudy resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 ImagingStudy resources.

constraint.requirements: Cardinality constraints for procedure from R5 for use in FHIR R4

element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.partOf` has a context of ImagingStudy based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ImagingStudy`.
Element `ImagingStudy.partOf` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
To link an ImagingStudy to an Encounter use `encounter`.

element.short: R5: The performed procedure or code
element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.procedure` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `ImagingStudy.procedure` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.procedureReference` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Element `ImagingStudy.procedure` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.procedureCode` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: Why the study was requested / performed additional types
element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.reason` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.reasonCode` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Element `ImagingStudy.reason` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.reasonReference` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.reason` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.

element.short: R5: All of the distinct values for series' modalities additional types
element.definition: R5: `ImagingStudy.modality` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.modality` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.modality` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.modality` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.modality` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.

element.short: R5: The modality used for this series additional types
element.definition: R5: `ImagingStudy.series.modality` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.series.modality` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.series.modality` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.modality` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.modality` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.

element.definition: R5: `ImagingStudy.series.bodySite` additional types (CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BodyStructure)) additional types from child elements (concept, reference)
element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.series.bodySite` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.series.bodySite` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.bodySite` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.bodySite` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: concept, reference.

element.definition: R5: `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `ImagingStudy.series.laterality` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.

Element `ImagingStudy.series.performer.actor` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImagingStudy.series.performer.actor` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The standard extension `alternate-reference` has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `ImagingStudy.series.performer.actor` with unmapped reference targets: HealthcareService.
